notes: Classic Seattle Edomae omakase. Set courses only — 'we do not offer a la carte ordering.' Sushi-bar omakase $140/person (4 appetizer plates + 15 pieces seasonal nigiri, served by the chefs); table options Chef's Sushi Kaiseki $95 (7 courses, 11 nigiri) and Chef's Choice $85 (19 pieces as 5 courses); happy-hour sets $45-70. No vegetarian offering; some dietary accommodation. EXPERIENCE-ONLY counter: composer sells the omakase experience + seat at the bar + a sake pairing — no fabricated dish list.
